must_detect.matched_text:
Strictly Private & Confidential — Inside Information (CMSA) — A u r u m  M e r a  Berhad Board Memo: Cyber Incident Update — KLE Main Market issuer.
On 2026-07-12 02:40 MYT, abnormal outbound traffic from the Seri Kencana warehouse network indicated a credential-stuffing attempt affecting 214 internal accounts; matter is non-public pending assessment.
Operational impact: 3 of 11 scanners were quarantined; order fulfilment slowed ~7% for 9 hours; no physical injuries; PDPA notifications to affected employees are being drafted.
Disclosure posture: propose embargo until 2026-07-15 08:30 MYT, to align with KLE Listing Rules on immediate disclosure and allow containment to stabilise.
Pending transaction context — Project Orchid: definitive Share Sale Agreement (SSA) signed 2026-06-28 to acquire 60% of Sandalwood Tech Sdn Bhd for MYR 260,000,000; 12.5% earn-out linked to uptime KPIs.
Our preliminary legal view is this incident does not constitute a Material Adverse Change/Effect under SSA Clause 13, and no MAE trigger has been notified to counterparties.
Estimated remediation and third-party costs: MYR 4.8–6.2 million (c. 3.2% of FY25 projected EBIT), with cyber insurance deductible of MYR 500,000 under policy AMB-Cy-0029.
Financing: Term Sheet with Seavine Capital Bank Berhad contemplates a MYR 120,000,000 RCF; covenant headroom remains >25% post-incident based on stress test v0.3.
IR draft (not for circulation): if analysts enquire, state that core systems remained available, forensic investigation is ongoing, and there is currently no evidence of sensitive personal data exfiltration under PDPA.
Public-source note: KelanaDaily (public) carried a generic piece on sector outages on 2026-07-12; it did not identify Aurum Mera or any KLE issuer by name.
Identifiers (internal only): Incident ID A M B / 2 0 2 6 - 0 7 - 0 1 ; host kl-pro d-07 ; user e.krishnan+ops@aurum-mera.example; ref https://ops.aurum-mera.example/t/AM26%2F07%2F01.
Governance: Encik Firdaus Mahat, CISO, to brief the ARC; contact Puan Safiya Idris via s.idris@aurum-mera.example for Board queries; IR portal draft at https://ir.aurum-mera.example/notice?emb=20260715.
negated mac language: we expressly confirm no MAC has been asserted by lenders or the Project Orchid vendor as at 2026-07-13 18:00 MYT.
